diagrams.title: Linear Transformation Mapping Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows domain vector space V mapping to codomain W through transformation T, illustrating kernel (pre-image of zero) and range (image in codomain)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where kernel and range exist in the transformation

diagrams.title: Rank-Nullity Theorem Visualization
diagrams.description: Decomposition of domain V into kernel and complementary subspace, showing how dimensions add up

diagrams.title: Types of Linear Transformations in ℝ²
diagrams.description: Geometric visualization of different linear transformations: identity, scaling, rotation, reflection, shear, projection
diagrams.purpose: Visualize geometric effect of different transformations

diagrams.title: Eigenvalue-Eigenvector Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows eigenvector direction that remains unchanged (only scaled) under transformation, contrasted with other vectors that get rotated
